title: Metabolic landscape of the tumor microenvironment at single cell resolution.
author: Xiao Z Dai Z Locasale JW
content: S-EPMC6704063 PMC6704063 Metabolic landscape of the tumor microenvironment at single cell resolution. The tumor milieu consists of numerous cell types each existing in a different environment. However, a characterization of metabolic heterogeneity at single-cell resolution is not established. Here
